text: (4) No minor shall become member or nominee of the One Person Company or can hold share with beneficial interest.
sentence_window:
(2) No person shall be eligible to incorporate more than a One Person Company or become nominee in more than one
such company. (3) Where a natural person, being member in One Person Company in accordance with this rule becomes a member in
another such Company by virtue of his being a nominee in that One Person Company, such person shall meet the
eligibility criteria specified in sub rule (2) within a period of one hundred and eighty days. (4) No minor shall become member or nominee of the One Person Company or can hold share with beneficial interest. (5) Such Company cannot be incorporated or converted into a company under section 8 of the Act. (6) Such Company cannot carry out Non-Banking Financial Investment activities including investment in securities of
any body corporates.
